ground_truth.description: _count_diff_changes() is a near-verbatim duplicate of the existing _git_diff_stats() function defined at line 42. Both count lines changed and files modified between a base commit and HEAD using 'git diff --stat'. The new function uses asyncio.create_subprocess_exec while the existing one uses a shared _run() helper, but the logic and return type are identical.
The newly added _count_diff_changes() function is defined but never called anywhere in this diff or module. It appears to be dead code that duplicates existing functionality.
